doc_title: HUD Tenant Rights Fact Sheet TRF-2026-IL
label: fabricated
reason: The document provides dangerously inaccurate legal advice that misrepresents Illinois landlord-tenant law and misattributes it to HUD.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 100
REASON: The document incorrectly describes Illinois law by claiming tenants must vacate after a 5-day notice without a court order, which contradicts the fundamental requirements of the Illinois Forcible Entry and Detainer Act.
